title: Bad guy hoglin
description: Mod added mobs and weapons armor and more!
body:
⚠️WARNING⚠️

!!For those who have a weak computer, then disable the appearance of mobs in the rules of the game, this is due  to the fact that a lot of mobs appear from this mod!!

📃Description📃

 In this mod you can encounter new mobs like bad guy hoglin, bad guy piglin, pillager, pillager boss, strider and cold, bad guy and so on... It also adds new blocks and items!  Such as hoglin sword, pigstep, netherite sword , netherite block and so on...
 

Mod created in MCreator

https://mcreator.net/download

Developers: Hoglin100, piglin2
